content:
Menu page (分类点单页) created successfully. All 4 files written to `d:/milkTea/pages/menu/`:

1. **menu.js** - Page logic with category/drinks loading from cloud DB (with mock data fallback), category switching, spec picker show/hide, cart integration (add/update/count/total), and navigation to cart/checkout pages.

2. **menu.json** - Component references: cart-bar, spec-picker, empty-state. Navigation bar title: "点餐".

3. **menu.wxml** - Layout: shop header (gradient) → menu body (left category sidebar scroll-view + right drink list scroll-view) → bottom cart-bar → spec-picker overlay. Includes loading dots animation, empty state, drink cards with image/name/desc/price/stock/add button, and sold-out state handling.

4. **menu.wxss** - Full styling: gradient shop header, 180rpx category sidebar with active indicator bar, drink card grid with shadows, price in red, orange gradient add button, bounce loading animation, fadeIn stagger animation for drink items.

All files match the provided specifications exactly.
